summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEVYN e-commerce MVP. All core functionality working correctly including admin panel, product management, user registration, cart operations, and checkout flow with PayPal integration.

design_issues.issue: PostHog analytics CORS errors in console
design_issues.description: Cross-origin frame access errors from PostHog analytics service - does not affect core functionality

passed_tests: Homepage loads with SEVYN branding and gothic theme
Admin dashboard and product creation UI
Product detail page with size selection and quantity controls
Checkout flow with shipping form and PayPal integration
User registration flow with automatic login
Complete e-commerce flow: register → browse → add to cart → checkout
